raw_input: Therapists spend 2 hours on documentation after every session. JotPsych generates clinical-quality notes automatically, so you can leave on time. --v2
value_proposition: Generate clinical-quality notes automatically and reclaim 2 hours of your day to leave work on time
pain_point: Therapists are trapped at their desks for 2+ hours after their last patient doing documentation, leading to late nights, weekend work, and burnout
desired_action: Sign up for free trial or book a demo to see how JotPsych can automate their clinical documentation
tone_direction: Empathetic but urgent. Acknowledge the exhaustion without being depressing. Shift quickly to relief and possibility. Use 'you' language. Conversational but professional. Avoid corporate jargon—speak like a fellow clinician who found the solution.
visual_direction: Split-screen contrast: LEFT SIDE shows therapist alone in dim office at 8pm, surrounded by charts, rubbing tired eyes, clock prominently showing late hour. RIGHT SIDE shows same therapist closing laptop at 5:30pm, grabbing coat, sunlight still visible through window. Color grade: left is cool/blue (exhaustion), right is warm/golden (freedom). For video: transition from left to right with smooth wipe, ending on smile/relief.
